headlines.title: Strait of Hormuz 'completely open' to commercial ships for remainder of ceasefire, Iran says
headlines.summary: Iran announces the Strait of Hormuz is open to commercial shipping during the ceasefire period, while President Trump states the US blockade of Iranian ports will remain until a permanent peace deal is agreed.

headlines.title: What we know about the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
headlines.summary: A 10-day truce between Israel and Lebanon is now in effect, with Iran-backed Hezbollah voicing support as negotiations continue between the US and Iran.

headlines.title: Europe has 'maybe 6 weeks of jet fuel left,' energy agency head warns
headlines.summary: IEA Executive Director Fatih Birol warns of major economic disruptions if ships are not allowed through the Strait of Hormuz, with Europe facing critical jet fuel shortages.

headlines.title: Pope Leo blasts leaders who spend billions on wars, says world 'ravaged by a handful of tyrants'
headlines.summary: In unusually forceful remarks in Cameroon, Pope Leo criticized global military spending and leadership, reflecting growing concern with the direction of world affairs.

headlines.title: Iran rejects US ceasefire proposal, demands permanent end to war
headlines.summary: Iran has conveyed its response to the U.S. proposal through Pakistan, rejecting a temporary ceasefire and emphasizing the necessity of a permanent end to the conflict.

headlines.title: Ukrainian drone attacks significantly impacting Russian nitrogen fertilizer industry
headlines.summary: Billionaire Andrei Melnichenko, founder of EuroChem, reports that Ukrainian drone attacks in recent months are having a significant impact on Russia's nitrogen fertilizer industry.

headlines.title: Kremlin warns European countries becoming more involved in Ukraine war
headlines.summary: The Kremlin states that European countries are becoming more involved in the war, referencing warnings about drone production sites across the continent and in Britain.

headlines.title: Hungary's incoming PM Peter Magyar begins EU talks to unblock frozen funds
headlines.summary: Hungary's election winner Peter Magyar starts initial talks with EU officials in Budapest to unblock funds frozen by the bloc over disputes with his predecessor.

headlines.title: Palestinians hand over suspect in 1982 attack on Jewish restaurant in Paris
headlines.summary: Hicham Harb, suspected of directing the 1982 Rue des Rosiers attack and acting as one of the gunmen, has been handed over to authorities.

headlines.title: Runaway wolf finally captured after nine-day search in South Korea
headlines.summary: A wolf that escaped and evaded capture for nine days has been caught, gripping South Korea and even inspiring a meme coin during the search.
